scores.notes: Response says the file was written, then provides a detailed annotated walkthrough with code snippets. All three requirements are present: command from config, env vars from database relation, HTTP health check with url field. Uses event.workload, add_layer with combine=True, replan(), override:replace, on-check-failure — all idiomatic. Minor deviation: reads relation data from relation.data[remote_unit] (unit databag) rather than relation.data[relation.app] (app databag) as in the gold standard, but this is a valid pattern for unit-based interfaces, not a hallucination. All APIs (CheckLevel.READY, CheckStatus.DOWN, get_checks) are real ops/pebble APIs.
